title: Robo Recess
short_description: Program Beep the robot with arrow commands, press RUN, and steer him across the playground to the ball.
description: It's playtime, but Beep the robot only moves if you PROGRAM him! Tap arrow commands to build his program, press RUN, and watch Beep execute it step by step across the playground to reach the ball. Bump a wall and Beep bonks his head (he's fine, mostly) — debug your program and run it again. Younger coders steer across an open playground; older ones dodge walls, and in grades 4–5 Beep's battery only holds the exact number of commands of the shortest path, so every move must count. Sequencing, planning ahead and debugging — the first real ideas of computer programming, no reading of code required. A free online beginner coding game for kids in grades 1–5, with efficiency and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Tap arrow buttons to build the program, ↩️ to undo, ▶ RUN to execute.
